scripts.dev:api: sst shell -- sh -c 'cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload'
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/ -q
scripts.test:backend:fast: cd backend && uv run pytest tests/unit tests/integration -q -m 'not agent'
scripts.eval:braintrust:seed: cd backend && uv run python scripts/create_braintrust_dataset.py
scripts.eval:braintrust:quality: cd backend && uv run braintrust eval --env-file .env evals/braintrust/eval_output_quality.py
scripts.eval:braintrust:trajectory: cd backend && uv run braintrust eval --env-file .env evals/braintrust/eval_trajectory.py
scripts.braintrust:push:prompts: cd backend && uv run braintrust push --env-file .env braintrust/prompts/restaurant_booking_agent.py
scripts.eval:strands:quality: cd backend && uv run python -u evals/strands/output_quality_eval.py
scripts.eval:strands:trajectory: cd backend && uv run python -u evals/strands/trajectory_eval.py
